{
  "judge_id": "Judge-1",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.4", "R1.7", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],

  "rationale": {
    "R1.4": "Names one prior work (Park et al., 2023) and articulates the delta in terms of architecture and benchmark scope.",
    "R1.7": "Audits every load-bearing citation; flags missing key works with bibliographic precision.",
    "RX.1": "Flags uncertainty for one clearly out-of-reach claim (the existence and performance of Park et al., 2023, on TREC-LongTask and MS-MARCO-Horizon).",
    "RX.3": "Output covers exactly the agreed J*(d).",
    "RX.4": "No regressions; identifies harmful patterns in the original (self-contradiction in novelty claims).",
    "RX.5": "Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.4": 0.8,
    "R1.7": 0.9,
    "RX.1": 0.8,
    "RX.3": 1.0,
    "RX.4": 1.0,
    "RX.5": 1.0
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.4: Names one prior work (Park et al., 2023) and articulates the delta in terms of architecture and benchmark scope.
rationale.R1.7: Audits every load-bearing citation; flags missing key works with bibliographic precision.
rationale.RX.1: Flags uncertainty for one clearly out-of-reach claim (the existence and performance of Park et al., 2023, on TREC-LongTask and MS-MARCO-Horizon).
rationale.RX.3: Output covers exactly the agreed J*(d).
rationale.RX.4: No regressions; identifies harmful patterns in the original (self-contradiction in novelty claims).
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason.
